Modal Component (S9-01)

Click the button to open the modal. Test: focus trap, Escape key, backdrop click.

Modal Title

This is a modal using the native <dialog> element.

Dropdown Component (S9-02)

Click the button to toggle the dropdown. Test: Popover API, light-dismiss (click outside).

  • Option 1
  • Option 2
  • Option 3

    Tooltip Component (S9-03)

    Hover over the triggers. Test: Anchor Positioning, position auto-flip at viewport edges.

    Hover me (top) Hover me (bottom) Hover me (left) Hover me (right)

    Notification Component (S9-04)

    Click to show notifications. Test: autodismiss (5s), hover pause, manual dismiss.
